title: Ferny Spreading Blossom: batch 21 curation claim opened
body: Opened claim 88e64575-f98e-40fa-be92-a73a4f8311d0 for dedicated knowledge curation batch 21. Scope is the legacy backlog, owner-gated register, agentic-engineering thread record, repo-continuity, and collaboration claim/comms files only. Live state before claim: 0 active claims and 0 open commit intents. Batch candidates: hook-layer safety net for destructive operations; fat-baton handoff; workflow gaps directly relevant to in-flight consolidation; cross-thread git-history observable coordination; inventory-as-output, not as-document. Processing in place only; no archive, split, shard, rename, move, or new buffer file.
